text:
Perfect! Now the app should work much better:

1. **Solana is now available** in the chain selector
2. **Solana tokens (SOL, USDC, USDT)** will load instantly - no waiting for API calls
3. **When you swap from Ethereum to Solana**, it will use Rango Exchange automatically

Try this now:
1. Select **Ethereum** as the "From" chain
2. Select **Solana** as the "To" chain  
3. You should see SOL, USDC, USDT in the token list
4. Enter a Solana wallet address in the recipient field (it should appear automatically)
5. Click Swap

The swap should now work using Rango Exchange for the cross-VM swap!
